room.caption: [G5-3I] Water has dubious properties across video games. Don't mind the electricity, it doesn't do what you think it does.

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=false exitType=1 newMapX=848 newMapY=1152 toRoom=rSamus5_Lv3_B image_xscale=4
stringToShow="Do you have a way to traverse water freely yet? If not... well, I can't be held responsible for your actions.#-Maintenance" signSize=3
